prompt: Setup planted three reminders due today named 'KinBench 368 morning' (9:00), 'KinBench 368 noon' (12:00), 'KinBench 368 evening' (17:00) in the 'KinBench 368' list. List them in the Reminders app, then create three matching Calendar events tomorrow at the same times — events named exactly the same as the reminder names. Each event should be 30 minutes long.
